channel.title: Posts on Tarun Bhardwaj
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Tarun Bhardwaj

item.title: Why Most People Never Question Life
item.description:
Most people are busy surviving.

Very few stop and ask:

Why am I doing what I am doing?

Why do I believe what I believe?

Why does society reward conformity more than awareness?

This blog is my attempt to explore those questions.
